gameplay.note: Short toy-like loop: feed spores, blink the moon-mouth, and chase escalating specimen text.

controls.note: Mouse lure plus F/Space inputs are easy to test and easy to discover from the overlay.

visualClarity.note: Readable neon HUD, high-contrast cursor sigil, and simple spore silhouettes keep the weirdness legible.

performance.note: Canvas-only 2D effects with capped bloom/spore counts should stay lightweight.

replayability.note: Fun as a bizarre arcade curiosity, though it needs scoring goals for longer sessions.

agentSelfTestQuality.note: Smoke coverage checks loading, start flow, input handling, HUD mutation, whisper updates, and screenshots.
